meta.title: Privacy Policy — kalandra.tech
meta.description: Privacy policy for kalandra.tech — how we collect, use, and protect your data.

heading: Privacy Policy
intro: This privacy policy explains how kalandra.tech ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our website.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: When you create an account or use our services, we may collect the following information:
items: Email address (when you sign up or sign in)
Name and profile information (when you sign in via Google OAuth)
Information you voluntarily submit through forms (e.g., job offers)

sections.title: How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use the collected information for the following purposes:
items: To provide and maintain our services
To authenticate your identity and manage your account
To process and display job offers you submit
To communicate with you about your account or submissions
To improve our website and services

sections.title: Authentication & Data Storage
sections.content: We use Supabase for authentication and data storage. Your authentication data (email, password hash, OAuth tokens) is managed by Supabase's infrastructure. Passwords are never stored in plain text. For more information, refer to Supabase's privacy policy.

sections.title: Analytics & Observability
sections.content: We use third-party tools to monitor the performance and reliability of our website. Data such as page views, errors, logs, and usage patterns may be sent to services including, but not limited to, Sentry, PostHog, BetterStack, or other observability and analytics tools. These services may collect technical information such as your IP address, browser type, operating system, and interaction data. This data is used solely for improving the quality, performance, and security of our services.

sections.title: Cookies & Local Storage
sections.content: We use browser local storage and cookies to manage your authentication session and remember your preferences (such as dark mode and language settings). We do not use third-party advertising cookies.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share data with service providers (Supabase, analytics and observability tools listed above) solely for the purpose of operating and improving our services.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide you with our services. You may request deletion of your account and associated personal data by contacting us. Please note that job offers you have submitted, including all related data and comments, are retained indefinitely as part of our permanent records and will not be deleted upon account deletion.

sections.title: Your Rights
items: Access the personal data we hold about you via your Profile page

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: If you have any questions about this privacy policy or your personal data, please contact us at pavel@kalandra.tech.

sections.title: Changes to This Policy
sections.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
